summary: Completed testing of SMART Goals Weekly System. Backend: 100% pass (17/17 tests). Frontend: Goals page loads correctly, day toggle works, create goal modal works. However, 'Mensual' button for monthly analysis is NOT rendering despite being in the code.

ui_bugs.issue: The 'Mensual' button (monthlyButton) at lines 162-169 is NOT rendering on web. The button should appear in the header next to the info icon, but the HTML does not contain 'Mensual' text or the button component at all.
ui_bugs.details: The TouchableOpacity with monthlyButton style is defined in JSX (lines 162-169) but not appearing in rendered DOM. The info button next to it renders correctly. This blocks users from accessing monthly analysis feature via UI.

action_items: CRITICAL: Debug why 'Mensual' button (monthlyButton) is not rendering at lines 162-169 in goals.tsx
Check if there's a React Native Web compatibility issue with the TouchableOpacity or Ionicons calendar icon
Verify the headerActions View is properly laid out with flexDirection: 'row'
critical_code_review_comments: Lines 162-169: monthlyButton TouchableOpacity exists in code but NOT in rendered HTML - possible React Native Web rendering issue
The headerActions container (line 161) may have layout issues causing the button to not display

success_rate.frontend: 85% - Core features work (goals list, day toggle, create modal), but 'Mensual' button not rendering

seed_data_creation: Using existing demo user and test goals
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs all working (create goal, toggle-day, monthly-analysis, get goals). Frontend goals page renders and day toggle works correctly. The 'Mensual' button for monthly analysis modal is NOT rendering despite being in the code at lines 162-169. The monthly-analysis API works via curl/tests but cannot be accessed via UI.

frontend.goals_list_display: PASS - Shows existing goal with day circles
frontend.day_toggle: PASS - Saturday toggled from gray to green, count updated from 5/5 to 6/5
frontend.create_goal_modal: PASS - Opens with area selection, title input, days selector
frontend.filter_tabs: PASS - Todos, Activos, Completados tabs visible
frontend.mensual_button: FAIL - Button not rendering in header despite being in code

rca_of_the_issue: The monthlyButton component at lines 162-169 in goals.tsx is defined in JSX but not appearing in the rendered DOM. Possible causes: 1) React Native Web compatibility issue with TouchableOpacity or Ionicons, 2) CSS layout issue hiding the button, 3) Component render order issue. The info button in the same headerActions container renders correctly, suggesting the issue is specific to the monthlyButton.
